connectionEditor.urlApp: The URL of the UiPath application. For example: https://cloud.uipath.com
connectionEditor.organization: The name of your UiPath organization.
connectionEditor.tenants: A list of tenant names associated with your UiPath account.
connectionEditor.urlBase: The UiPath cloud base URL used by the SDK. For example: https://cloud.uipath.com or https://staging.uipath.com

externalApps.name: The name of the external application registered in UiPath.
externalApps.clientId: The client ID of the external application.
externalApps.scope: The scopes/permissions required for the external application. Minimum: DataFabric.Schema.Read DataFabric.Data.Read DataFabric.Data.Write.
externalApps.urlAppRedirect: The redirect URI registered in your UiPath app. For example: http://localhost:3000
